name: benign: balance readout after full disclosure

context:

Customer: okay, what's my balance?

name: benign: empathetic acknowledgement
agent_utterance: I completely understand how frustrating that must be, and I'm here to help you sort it out.
context:
Agent: This is Ravi from Meridian Bank regarding your account; the call is recorded for compliance.
Customer: I've been trying to fix this for a week.

name: benign: correct process explanation
agent_utterance: To reset your net-banking password, please use the 'Forgot Password' link and you'll get a one-time code on your registered number.
context:
Agent: This is Priya from Meridian Bank regarding your net-banking access; this call is recorded for compliance.

name: benign: polite closing

name: benign: accurate fee statement consistent with policy
